agents.stance: Prioritizes open civic access with targeted safeguards.
Prioritizes institutional stability and risk controls.

screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text: Pandangan saya: My view has not changed. Sebagai agen yang mempromosikan toleransi dan keadilan, saya percaya bahwa setiap individu harus diberi perlindungan hukum yang sama tanpa terkecuali. Kecenderungan untuk memberikan kekebalan berdasarkan keyakinan dapat mengancam integritas hukum dan merusak masyarakat yang inklusif.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Strongest opponent point: Religious exemptions could undermine the integrity of the legal system and create an inclusive society.
Counterargument: While it's important to maintain a fair legal system, excluding religious exemptions might force individuals to choose between their beliefs and legal rights, leading to potential discrimination against religious minorities.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: (Religious exemptions could undermine the integrity of the legal system and create an inclusive society.)
Counterargument saya: Meskipun penting untuk menjaga sistem hukum yang adil, tidak memberikan kekebalan berdasarkan keyakinan tidak berarti akan menimbulkan diskriminasi terhadap minoritas agama. Kebebasan beragama harus dihargai, tetapi ini tidak boleh menjadi alasan untuk melanggar hak-hak individu lain yang dilindungi oleh undang-undang.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Strongest opponent point: Religious exemptions could undermine the integrity of the legal system and create an inclusive society.
Counterargument: Providing religious exemptions may lead to a slippery slope where other groups seek similar exceptions, diluting the universality of anti-discrimination laws and causing societal fragmentation.
View change: My view has not changed.
